title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 21. INSURANCE DATA SECURITY

§2501. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Insurance Data Security Law".

            Acts 2020, No. 283, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 21.  INSURANCE DATA SECURITY
§2501.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Insurance Data Security Law".
Acts 2020, No. 283, §1.
